title: Nano Banana Runtime Compact
description: Compact prompt payload ready for a Gemini image generation or editing call.

examples.prompt: Create a digital festival poster with readable on-image text. Subject: lantern procession crossing a bridge — spring festival, patterned robes, evening procession, decorative lantern glow; moving in a graceful line across the bridge over dark water; varied but rhythmically staged figures; joyful but composed. Scene: riverside bridge scene, Edo-inspired historical festival setting, Japanese urban river district, clear spring evening, blue hour into night, water planes, distant rooflines, low decorative cloud shapes, controlled lantern reflections. World logic: the title field should remain uncluttered in the upper third, lantern reflections should rhythmically echo across the water, architecture and garments should remain period-coherent. Composition: poster illustration, vertical composition with a dominant upper title field and midframe procession band, elevated side view with graceful asymmetry, 35mm lens feel, flattened decorative depth appropriate to print language, decorative procession flow from lower-left toward upper-right, negative space: quiet upper-third field for title and subhead, aspect ratio 9:16. Lighting: key light: soft lantern glow distributed across the bridge, fill: cool evening sky wash, rim: subtle warm edge on robe silhouettes nearest lantern clusters, practicals: paper lanterns, clear evening air with restrained decorative mist shapes, material response: matte paper lanterns, patterned textiles, ink-flat water surfaces, lacquer accents, warm lanterns against cool twilight field. Style stack: manga, historical, ukiyo-e, japanese-edo, poster-layout, text-in-image, woodblock-inspired line rhythm and color separation, festive grace with calm elegance, palette: indigo, vermillion, warm lantern gold, soft cream, Edo print poster language traits: flattened depth, contour rhythm, pattern discipline, asymmetric crop elegance. On-image text: headline: Lanterns of Spring; subhead: A Night Procession of Light and Pattern; body: April 18 • River Arts Hall • Kyoto District; legal: Presented by the Museum of Seasonal Arts. Text layout: headline in upper third, body copy in lower third, legal line at footer, 8% on all sides with extra breathing room at top, en. Must include: readable title hierarchy, uncluttered upper title field, bridge procession rhythm, period-coherent garments. Avoid: modern neon signage, photo-real skin rendering, busy texture behind headline, trending on artstation, 8k. Accessibility: strong headline contrast, clear separation between title and background.

thinking_config.note: Use chat/session history for multi-turn edits so thought signatures are preserved by the SDK.

metadata.provenance: Gemini-generated or Gemini-edited output; SynthID watermark expected for generated images.
notes: Poster layout with exact typography hierarchy and cultural styling benefits from the higher-fidelity model.

examples.prompt: Edit the source image(s) to achieve this goal: Upgrade a clean packshot into a premium campaign still without changing the product identity. Subject: frosted glass skincare bottle — cylindrical, silver cap, centered label, minimal design; standing still on a tabletop surface; front-facing with slight three-quarter cap turn. Scene: studio tabletop product setup, contemporary, studio controlled, currently matte gray, to be replaced. World logic: the bottle silhouette and front-facing label must remain exact, the new background may influence color bounce but not geometry, the tabletop reflection and shadow anchor should remain believable. Composition: product hero still, centered bottle with comfortable breathing room, eye-level to product shoulder, 90mm lens feel, sharp focus on label plane with soft falloff behind, static studio setup, negative space: clean upper area for possible campaign wordmark, aspect ratio 1:1. Lighting: key light: large soft top-front source maintaining premium packshot clarity, fill: restrained frontal return, rim: narrow teal edge from back right, clear studio air, material response: frosted glass diffusion, satin paper label, brushed silver cap, neutral key with jewel-toned rim accent. Style stack: photoreal, product, instagram-post, clean premium photography, quiet luxury, palette: emerald, silver, soft neutral white, luxury skincare advertising traits: restrained reflections, calm spacing, premium material emphasis. Preserve exactly: exact bottle silhouette, cap alignment, label geometry and text, camera angle and crop, tabletop reflection, shadow footprint. Change only: replace matte gray background with wet emerald marble, add narrow teal rim light from back right, keep the overall lighting premium and controlled. Mask hint: background replacement should avoid touching bottle edges or label plane. Delta priority: preservation first, environment second, lighting accent third. Must include: label fully readable, premium jewel-toned backdrop, controlled reflections. Avoid: bottle geometry drift, extra props, warped label text, masterpiece, award-winning. Accessibility: clear object-background separation.

thinking_config.note: Use chat/session history for multi-turn edits so thought signatures are preserved by the SDK.

metadata.provenance: Gemini-generated or Gemini-edited output; SynthID watermark expected for generated images.
notes: Strict product preservation and label fidelity need a careful edit path.
